package.name: madara_description
package.description: Madara 6-DoF Arm Description. Actuators: 1x JGA25-371 DC motor (top_plate_joint, continuous, encoder+PID on Arduino Uno) 5x MG966R servos (lower_arm, upper_arm, wrist, claw_base, right_claw) Sensor: Raspberry Pi Camera Module v2 (fixed on base_plate, box geometry) Comms: UART — RPi 5 to Arduino Uno via madara_hardware_interface
